{{nihongo|'''Nushiishino Shrine'''|主石神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Hitachi Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Nushiishino Shrine'''|主石神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Hitachi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Nushiishino Shrine'''|主石神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Hitachi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Nushiishino Shrine'''|主石神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Hitachi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Nushiishino Shrine'''|主石神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Hitachi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Nushiishino Shrine'''|主石神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Hitachi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Nushiishino Shrine'''|主石神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Hitachi Province]].
